title: Frieren: Beyond Journey's End GUI Pack
description: Frieren: Beyond Journey's End GUI Pack
body:
**![Preview Image](https://i.imgur.com/bdUUpR7.png)**

**Compatibility:** This resource pack is GUI-only and can be used alongside other resource packs. Just place it on top of the resource pack you use.

**About:** This is a GUI packed themed towards the heart touching Show "Frieren: Beyond Journey's End". I have even changed hot bar as well hope you enjoy. I have taken the opportunity to experiment with adding different pictures to each container. The palette that I choose is Green & White & Yellow  but maybe in the future, If you guys want other colors like Pink & Red or any colors else. please tell me I will think about it! If you encounter any bugs, please report them, and I'll address them promptly. You can contact me on my discord server

**Join Our Discord:** Explore our Discord server where you can suggest and vote for the next pack, participate in anime discussions.  [Join Here](https://discord.gg/RvScgzj3Ph)

**Feature Highlights:**
- **Hud:** ![Image](https://i.imgur.com/9A6FXIm.png)
- **Settings:** ![Image](https://i.imgur.com/GbiSXAS.png)
- **Anvil:** ![Image](https://i.imgur.com/4l27GaW.png)
- **Shulker Box:** ![Image](https://i.imgur.com/Hpktjrg.png)
- **Crafting Table:** ![Image](https://i.imgur.com/Wg8UkWJ.png)
- **Loom:** ![Image](https://i.imgur.com/MQnpqZ2.png)
- **Enchantment Table:** ![Image](https://i.imgur.com/aN1khpS.png)
- **Furnace:** ![Image](https://i.imgur.com/DbYKPsE.png)
- **Brewing Stand:** ![Image](https://i.imgur.com/Id8f6xS.png)
- **Beacon Menu:** ![Image](https://i.imgur.com/2ZdW4SX.png)
- **Villager Trading Table:** ![Image](https://i.imgur.com/7Hpbi45.png)

**Community Engagement:**
Join our Discord server to suggest and vote for the next pack, participate in anime discussions, and have a chance to win Discord Nitro giveaways every month. [Discord Server](https://discord.gg/RvScgzj3Ph)
